Provides core 'French school' multivariate analysis methods including
Multiple Factor Analysis (MFA), Penalized MFA, STATIS, variants of
Correspondence Analysis (BADA, BAMFA), and Generalized Procrustes
Analysis. Also includes essential utility functions for data simulation,
testing, and processing potentially used by related statistical
packages.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`aligned_mcca()`](aligned_mcca.md) : Aligned Multiblock Canonical
  Correlation Analysis (Aligned MCCA)
- [`aligned_mfa()`](aligned_mfa.md) : Aligned Multiple Factor Analysis
  (Aligned MFA)
- [`anchored_mcca()`](anchored_mcca.md) : Anchored Multiblock Canonical
  Correlation Analysis (Anchored MCCA)
- [`autoplot(`*`<bada>`*`)`](autoplot.bada.md) : Autoplot for BaDA
- [`autoplot(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](autoplot.bamfa.md) : Autoplot for BaMFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](autoplot.covstatis.md) : Autoplot for
  COVSTATIS
- [`autoplot(`*`<linked_mfa>`*`)`](autoplot.linked_mfa.md) : Autoplot
  for Linked MFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<mfa>`*`)`](autoplot.mfa.md) : Autoplot for MFA
- [`autoplot(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](autoplot.penalized_mfa.md) :
  Autoplot for Penalized MFA
- [`bada()`](bada.md) [`bootstrap(`*`<bada>`*`)`](bada.md)
  [`reprocess(`*`<bada>`*`)`](bada.md)
  [`project(`*`<bada>`*`)`](bada.md) : Barycentric Discriminant Analysis
  (generic)
- [`bamfa()`](bamfa.md) : Barycentric Multiple Factor Analysis (BaMFA)
- [`bilinear_mixed()`](bilinear_mixed.md) : Bilinear Repeated-Measures
  Mixed Model
- [`bilinear_mixed_easy()`](bilinear_mixed_easy.md) : Easy Front-End for
  Bilinear Mixed
- [`bilinear_mixed_recommend()`](bilinear_mixed_recommend.md) :
  Recommend Practical Defaults for Bilinear Mixed
- [`bilinear_mixed_tune()`](bilinear_mixed_tune.md) : Tune Bilinear
  Mixed Hyperparameters via Subject-Block CV
- [`check_duality()`](check_duality.md) : Verify duality between ROI-
  and RV-space coordinates
- [`covstatis()`](covstatis.md) : STATIS for Covariance Matrices
  (generic)
- [`estimate_components()`](estimate_components.md)
  [`loading_reliability()`](estimate_components.md) : Estimate the
  number of components and loading reliability (shared helpers)
- [`ipca()`](ipca.md) : Integrated Principal Components Analysis
  (generic)
- [`ipca_tune_alpha()`](ipca_tune_alpha.md) : Tune Tied Penalties for
  iPCA via 1D Alpha Search
- [`anchored_mfa()`](linked_mfa.md) [`linked_mfa()`](linked_mfa.md) :
  Anchored Multiple Factor Analysis (Anchored MFA)
- [`mcca()`](mcca.md) : Multiblock Canonical Correlation Analysis
  (generic)
- [`mfa-plots`](mfa-plots.md) : Plotting Functions for MFA and Linked
  MFA
- [`mfa()`](mfa.md) : Multiple Factor Analysis (generic)
- [`penalized_mfa()`](penalized_mfa.md) : Penalized Multiple Factor
  Analysis (MFA)
- [`penalized_mfa_clusterwise()`](penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md)
  [`pmfa_cluster()`](penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md) : Penalized MFA with
  Clusterwise Spatial Smoothness Constraints
- [`plot(`*`<bada>`*`)`](plot.bada.md) : Plot BaDA Results
- [`plot(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](plot.bamfa.md) : Plot BaMFA Results
- [`plot(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](plot.covstatis.md) : Plot COVSTATIS
  Results
- [`plot(`*`<linked_mfa>`*`)`](plot.linked_mfa.md) : Plot Linked MFA
  Scores
- [`plot(`*`<mfa>`*`)`](plot.mfa.md) : Plot MFA Scores
- [`plot(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](plot.penalized_mfa.md) : Plot
  Penalized MFA Results
- [`plot_barycenters()`](plot_barycenters.md) : Plot Class Barycenters
  for BaDA
- [`plot_block_fit()`](plot_block_fit.md) : Plot Block Reconstruction
  Error
- [`plot_block_similarity()`](plot_block_similarity.md) : Plot Block
  Similarity Matrix
- [`plot_block_weights()`](plot_block_weights.md) : Plot Block Weights
- [`plot_convergence()`](plot_convergence.md) : Plot Convergence Trace
- [`plot_coverage()`](plot_coverage.md) : Plot Block Coverage Map
- [`plot_feature_groups()`](plot_feature_groups.md) : Plot Feature Group
  Loadings
- [`plot_global_local()`](plot_global_local.md) : Plot Global vs Local
  Decomposition for BaMFA
- [`plot_loading_alignment()`](plot_loading_alignment.md) : Plot Loading
  Alignment for Penalized MFA
- [`plot_loadings()`](plot_loadings.md) : Plot Variable Loadings
- [`plot_partial_scores()`](plot_partial_scores.md) : Plot Partial
  Factor Scores
- [`plot_subjects()`](plot_subjects.md) : Plot subject clouds in RV and
  ROI spaces
- [`plot_variance()`](plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.covstatis()`](plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.bada()`](plot_variance.md)
  [`plot_variance.penalized_mfa()`](plot_variance.md) : Plot Variance
  Explained (Scree Plot)
- [`predict(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](predict.bamfa.md) : Predict method for
  BaMFA objects
- [`print(`*`<bamfa>`*`)`](print.bamfa.md) : Print Method for BaMFA
  Objects
- [`print(`*`<penalized_mfa>`*`)`](print.penalized_mfa.md) : Print
  Method for Penalized MFA Objects
- [`print(`*`<penalized_mfa_clusterwise>`*`)`](print.penalized_mfa_clusterwise.md)
  : Print Method for Penalized MFA Clusterwise Objects
- [`project()`](project.md) [`reprocess()`](project.md) : Re‑export
  selected generics from \*\*multivarious\*\*
- [`project_cov()`](project_cov.md) : Project a Covariance Matrix
  (generic)
- [`project_covariate()`](project_covariate.md) : Project a
  Subject-Level Covariate (generic)
- [`project_subjects()`](project_subjects.md) : Project and Summarize
  New Subject Data (generic)
- [`reconstruct(`*`<covstatis>`*`)`](reconstruct.covstatis.md) :
  Low-rank reconstruction of the compromise matrix
- [`roi_map()`](roi_map.md) : Extract ROI map for a compromise dimension
- [`significant_components()`](significant_components.md) : Identify
  Significant Components via RMT and Inter-block Coherence Tests
- [`synthetic_multiblock()`](synthetic_multiblock.md) : Generate
  synthetic multiblock data
